items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) received analyst upgrades in the past week, highlighting confidence in its lithium-focused business model. Research firms cited Albemarle's plans for expansion and productivity improvements as key factors behind their revised views. The company is viewed as w

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: 'In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced,' said Jerome Pecresse, head of Rio Tinto's aluminum and lithium business unit. Albemarle (ALB.US), the world's largest lithium producer, also noted that

items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from 'structural lithium demand tailwinds.' He added that the market is not fully recognizing Albemarle's long-term growth pot

items.headline: Does Albemarle's Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand to witness a CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Stationary storage is expected to be a significant driver for lithium demand along with EVs. Global Energy Storage Systems production rose 117% year over year in Q1 2026.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC
